svg.title: GEO optimization checklist
svg.desc: 8-step checklist for optimizing blog content for AI search citation, in Ozigi brand colors.
svg.text: GEO OPTIMIZATION CHECKLIST
8 steps to get cited by AI search
Answer first, context second
Lead with the answer. Explanation comes after.
Use question-based H2 headings
Mirror how people type queries into AI tools.
Include stats with source links
Cited data gets referenced up to 40% more.
Build a real FAQ section
Use Search Console queries. 40-60 word answers.
Use semantic HTML structure
H2, H3, ul, strong — structure signals hierarchy.
Add an llms.txt to your site root
Signals AI-readiness to crawlers in under an hour.
Check robots.txt allows AI bots
Blocking PerplexityBot = zero Perplexity citations.
Refresh key pages every quarter
Perplexity favors content updated within 18 months.
KEY INSIGHT
44% of all LLM citations come from the first 30% of a page — answer early.
Sources: Princeton GEO Paper (ACM SIGKDD 2024) · Seer Interactive · Semrush 2025
OZIGI
